description: Golden trace for SiteAuditorAgent — regression reference for aggregation logic and DB write

notes.data_source: GSC search analytics + rank_tracking table — no LLM
notes.gsc_fallback: If GSC unavailable (exception), gsc_rows_fetched=0 and agent continues — never fails
notes.mock_data: Set USE_MOCK_DATA=true in .env to use canned GSC rows without credentials
notes.rank_query: DISTINCT ON (keyword_id) status, position FROM rank_tracking ORDER BY keyword_id, checked_at DESC
notes.avg_position: Computed from non-null position values only (not_ranking rows excluded)

edge_cases.gsc_failure: Exception from GSC → gsc_rows=[], gsc_rows_fetched=0, agent status=success
edge_cases.all_not_ranking: avg_position=null when all positions are null
edge_cases.missing_site_url: status=failed if site_url not in params and GSC_SITE_URL not set
